meaning: 彼得格勒(苏联西北部港市列宁格勒
examples: St. Petersburg had become Petrograd in 1914.
Noted for its fine architecture and cultural achievements, the city was called Petrograd from 94 to 924.
The people of St Petersburg have had to endure first Petrograd and then Leningrad before reclaiming their city's pre-1914 name.
Born in Russia, he conducted the State Symphony Orchestra in Petrograd before moving to the U.S. to conduct the Boston Symphony Orchestra.
Born in Russia, he conducted the State Symphony Orchestra in Petrograd before moving to the United States to conduct the Boston Symphony Orchestra.
